rationale: Build on the current small-batch script by spending the last stretch of train time on the exact final int8/fp16 roundtrip path instead of optimizing only the float model. The added late quantization-aware snaps should reduce train-to-final mismatch on the metric we actually score, and the longer warmdown gives those snapped steps room to settle without changing the launcher contract.
title: Late Quantization-Aware Snap And Longer Warmdown
